description: Expected values must match Zillow's zestimate field (integer dollars) or not_available when Zillow exposes null/no public Zestimate. Re-verify on zillow.com and update verified_date when you change expected.

cases.notes: Sample Zillow payload had zestimate null (NoZestimate); strict agent should return not_available.
Replace expected with an integer from Zillow, set skip to false, set verified_date.
Commercial / campus; verify Zestimate on Zillow before locking expected.

cases.address: 525 W Prospect St Unit A, Seattle, WA 98119
cases.notes: Residential; good candidate once expected int is filled from Zillow.
